S.FORM: = Salman of Saudi Arabia = Mntucing hngkawas 1935 idas 12 jiyax 31 ka Salman of Saudi Arabia ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Saudi arabia ta sayang o kiya ka Salman of Saudi Arabia, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 1 jiyax 23 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = salman o* saudi aɾabia = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka salman o* saudi aɾabia ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan saudi aɾabia ta sajaŋ o kija ka salman o* saudi aɾabia, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Salman of Saudi Arabia = Mntucing hngkawas 1935 idas 12 jiyax 31 ka Salman of Saudi Arabia ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Saudi arabia ta sayang o kiya ka Salman of Saudi Arabia, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 1 jiyax 23 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = salman o* saudi aɾabia = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka salman o* saudi aɾabia ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan saudi aɾabia ta sajaŋ o kija ka salman o* saudi aɾabia, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
